rifqi: N15 was an overplay. After the corner died white couldn't do much, black had both points and some influence.
GoMeister: I should have tenuki instead of N15
rifqi: N17 instead of N15 would give playable results
rifqi: I'm not sure I like the approach at P17 though, at least not in this position. P16 feels better
rifqi: The difference would be that black wouldn't get a stone at P15 to help develop the right side
GoMeister: P15 is a good stone.  I wanted to avoid enclosure with P17
rifqi: I would like P17 if white already had a something on the right side or lower right corner
GoMeister: Wrong direction as black has Q3?
rifqi: yeah, I just feel that P15 helps the right side too much
rifqi: I still think it's playable but I just don't like it :p
GoMeister: I think I need to know more joseki to make it work though
rifqi: nah, I don't know many joseki at all, I just make stuff up :p
rifqi: the problem is that sometimes the opponent makes up something better :p
rifqi: also, since white was behind right from the start, E17 is too soft.
rifqi: White has to play B17, it doesn't really matter what happens after that, white needs to start a fight
rifqi: I think black R6 was a mistake in direction, it gave white a chance to do something in the centre
GoMeister: I was thinking chinese, but I just take the initiative.
rifqi: that would of course let black get sente to play at the bottom or right side though, so still nearly impossible for white to catch up
rifqi: hmm, my variation didn't seem to work, I'll try again
rifqi: still doesn't seem to work, weird
rifqi: or maybe you're seeing them
GoMeister: I don't see a difference in the second variation
rifqi: I don't see the variations at all, just shows the final board position
GoMeister: Good how you get 5 in sente with that
rifqi: yeah, it at least creates some decent potential in the centre
rifqi: in the game white was basically forced to play dame points in the center to connect his groups
GoMeister: Yeah I felt I wasn't getting any good moves towards the end game.  You were there already
rifqi: looking at the left side to see if white could have captured the three black stones
rifqi: I found a ko but I'm not at all confident that either side is playing the best moves
GoMeister: I thought you shouldn't get away that
rifqi: neither did I but A8 actually worked pretty good
rifqi: feels like there should be a way for white to capture cleanly
GoMeister: I expected that variation in the game
GoMeister: Didn't read as far as 7
rifqi: can't find a way right now, should ask someone stronger :p
rifqi: I believe it's time for bed here
GoMeister: Sure thing - thanks for the analysis

rifqi: thanks, I had to get a bit desperate though, messed up too much in the opening
rifqi: I was hoping you wouldn't see that I needed one more move for the lower left :p

Noobrunswick: maybe I should have sacrificed one stone
Noobrunswick: an walled off one side or the other
rifqi: I'm not sure L6 was good
rifqi: even though the shape is good locally
Noobrunswick: what would you have done instead of L6?
rifqi: L4 looks better, white isn't strong around here yet so black doesn't have to worry too much about the cut
Noobrunswick: wait, I played L5 in response to cap, not L6
rifqi: yes, I'm talking about the moves after black attached N5
rifqi: that also works, it's a bit clearer
Noobrunswick: maybe attachment at N5 not good?
rifqi: I think it's ok, black just has to remember that white is still weak and not get too defensive
Noobrunswick: yeah, white can't push through right away after L4
rifqi: my recommendation for all handicap games where you play black is to play agressively and attack white
rifqi: everything sounds good in theory :p
Noobrunswick: as soon as I get sent some day :)
rifqi: sente isn't given, it's taken :p
Noobrunswick: anyway, thanks - it was fun
Noobrunswick: I barely survived your attack on the top stones

rifqi: I also had a very far-fetched plan to kill the bottom group, it actually only has one eye :p

Noobrunswick: but your flaw in lower left let me play with more confidence
Noobrunswick: although if you exchange A7 for A5 and take at A9 to get an extra ko liberty
Noobrunswick: you can get a lot of dame
Noobrunswick: oh, I jump around between 5-7 kyu here all the time

Noobrunswick: once in a while I even sniff at 4k
rifqi: I'll kill you next time :p
